## Type of change

<!-- The PR title must follow Conventional Commits so the version bump and
     CHANGELOG are generated correctly when this PR is merged.

     Examples:
       feat: add support for XLIFF output format
       fix: restore nested placeholders in correct order
       perf: cache compiled regex patterns
       docs: add custom engine example
       refactor: extract shared sleep/truncate helpers
       chore: update TypeScript to 5.6

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`type: description`)
- [ ] Breaking changes are noted with `BREAKING CHANGE:` in the commit body or a `!` after the type (`feat!: ...`)
